MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,400.00 FILED BY NGUYEN, DEANNA AS TO DEFENDANT WHELAN, GRETCHEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, DEANNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHELAN, GRETCHEN $3,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,475.00, FOR SECURITY DEPOSIT NOT REFUNDED BY DEFENDANT & ONE MONTHS RENT PAID IN ADVANCE OF CONSTRUCTIVE EVICTION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
